name: Ravioli with Broccoli Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Substitute Romano Cheese if desired
1. Heat oil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add garlic, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes to the pan.
3. Sauté until the garlic is lightly browned (5-7 minutes).
4. Add cream; cook for 20 minutes to thicken, stirring occasionally.
5. Meanwhile, cut broccoli into 1-1/2 inch flowerets.
6. Place broccoli in a separate pan and cover with water.
7. Cook until tender, then drain and set aside.
8. Add cheese to the sauce mixture and stir to blend.
9. Prepare broccoli as directed, then drain.
10. Add the drained broccoli to the sauce and pour over the ravioli.
